goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'venetian' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'british' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '11:30' on 'tuesday'.
If the booking fails how about '10:30'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'whether they have internet'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve venetian food and should be in the moderate price range
The restaurant should be in the centre
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 11:30 on tuesday
If the booking fails how about 10:30
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant
Make sure you get area and whether they have internet
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
